prestazioni: B58B30C engine: Full bolt-on turbo system with Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbocharger (1.06 A/R turbine housing, 64mm billet compressor wheel) paired with a custom 4-inch titanium downpipe and GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for 28 psi peak boost on E85 fuel, supported by a PWR radiator and CSF intercooler with 50% larger core volume than OEM

B58B30C internals: Forged Mahle Motorsport pistons (9.5:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from 4Piston Racing, paired with a Tomei 272° camshaft (12.5mm lift) and upgraded valve springs/retainers from Supertech Performance for 8,000 RPM redline capability

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2.18 final drive ratio) with a Tilton twin-disc carbon clutch (800 ft-lb torque capacity), mated to a Getrag V161 transmission reinforced with a PPG gearset (1st: 3.82, 2nd: 2.36, 3rd: 1.69) and a Cusco transmission mount
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-SUPRA widebody kit (carbon fiber fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser) with custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap and exposed carbon fiber weave on the hood and roof, paired with a Rocket Bunny GT wing (1,200mm width, 300mm height) on adjustable carbon fiber mounts

OEM+ headlight retrofit with Morimoto XB LED projectors (5,500K color temperature) and sequential turn signals, combined with custom LED taillights from VLand (black housing, sequential startup animation) and a full carbon fiber engine cover from Seibon

Interior: Bride Zeta IV bucket seats (FIA-approved, carbon fiber shell) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, a custom roll cage from AutoPower (8-point, TIG-welded chromoly steel), and a Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm diameter, Alcantara grip) paired with a NRG quick-release hub
